## 仓库顶层目录和文件分组

### 配置/隐藏文件
- `.cargo/`、`.dockerignore`、`.env.example`、`.git/`、`.gitignore`、`.pids/`、`.vscode/`

### 文档
- `AGENTS.md`、`LICENSE`、`LICENSE.zh-CN.md`、`README.md`、`README.zh-CN.md`、`README_cn.md`、`RUSTCLAW_SERVICE_README.md`、`USAGE.md`

### Rust 项目
- `Cargo.lock`、`Cargo.toml`、`crates/`

### 图片资源
- `RustClaw.png`、`RustClaw480X320.png`、`longxia.png`

### 构建/交叉编译脚本
- `build-all.sh`、`build-ui-nginx.sh`、`cross-build-upload-cloud.sh`、`cross-build-upload.sh`、`local-cross-build-upload-pi.sh`、`package-release.sh`

### 启动/停止脚本
- `start-all-bin.sh`、`start-all.sh`、`start-clawd-ui.sh`、`start-clawd.sh`、`start-feishud.sh`、`start-future-adapters.sh`、`start-larkd.sh`、`start-telegramd.sh`、`start-wa-web-bridge.sh`、`start-wechatd.sh`、`start-whatsapp-webd.sh`、`start-whatsappd.sh`、`stop-rustclaw.sh`

### 工具/维护脚本
- `check-logs.sh`、`git-add-exclude.sh`、`install-rustclaw-cmd.sh`、`pack-to-parent.sh`、`push-sanitized-configs.sh`、`setup-config.sh`、`simulate-telegramd.sh`、`uninstall-rustclaw-cmd.sh`、`system_report.sh`

### Docker/容器
- `docker/`、`docker-compose.yml`、`rustclaw`（二进制）、`rustclaw.service`

### 前端/UI
- `UI/`、`node_modules/`、`package.json`、`package-lock.json`

### 文档目录
- `docs/`、`document/`

### 数据/存储
- `data/`、`logs/`、`migrations/`、`tmp/`、`test_contract.sqlite`、`memory-usage-plan.md`

### 其他目录和文件
- `configs/`、`external_skills/`、`image/`、`patches/`、`pi_app/`、`plan/`、`plans/`、`prompts/`、`run/`、`skill_develop/`、`skills_output/`、`target/`
- `path_note.txt`、`pwd_report.txt`、`failed-routing-cases.md`
